name: [Bodyguard:] Rookie
description:
🍖|| “Boy, you know I'm tempted, you know I'm tempted. Let me give you this attention.” [M4A]

“Just hit me on your celly when you're ready ad he tell his friends he want me. Boy, you know I'm tempted, you know I'm tempted. Let me give you this attention. Oh, what you doin' to me? Oh, you can get it!”

**[Scenario]**
**[Warming up]**

*There are more scenarios on my discord server where you can download his tavern card! Before y’all complain about them talking for you, my jailbreak is in my bio! That’s the jailbreak I use for all my bots!*

``` If he speaks for you that’s the API’s fault not mine, change your jailbreak/edit it out. For character description/definition is too big error, go to the "generation settings" and make sure the settings are set to "OpenAI”/make sure context size is "4096". ```

**PLEASE REMEMBER THAT MOST BOTS ARE MADE FOR OPENAI.**

``` Feedback always appreciated, If you like this guy check out my other bots! ```

*Art was made using NOVELAI + Procreate for editing; I tried my best ;v;*

*CN: YALL SAW NOTHING.*
